title: Edit hooks config
description: Per-project overrides for ~/.claude/format-and-lint.nu. Lives at the repo root and is picked up by walking up from the edited file. Typecheck rules are matched in order; the first matching rule runs. Commands receive the edited file's absolute path in the $FILE environment variable.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this schema.

typecheck.description: Ordered list of typecheck rules. First matching rule wins; files that match no rule are not typechecked.

match.description: Glob relative to this config file's directory. Supported syntax: **, *, ?, {alt1,alt2}.

command.description: Shell command to run. $FILE is the edited file's absolute path. Non-zero exit = failure. stdout+stderr are filtered to lines referencing the edited file (by relative path from cwd). Use "true" as a no-op to explicitly opt out of typechecking files matched by this rule.

cwd.description: Working directory for the command, relative to this config file's directory. Default: '.'
